data.title: Stardust Power Reports Q3 2024 Financial Results
data.description:
Stardust Power Inc. ( (SDST) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Stardust Power Inc. presented to its investors.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Stardust Power Inc., an American company, specializes in developing battery-grade lithium products to support the electric vehicle industry and strengthen energy supply chains. In its latest financial report, Stardust Power highlighted key operational milestones including its business combination completion and new Nasdaq listing, strengthening its leadership team, and strategic partnerships for its lithium refinery project. Financially, the company reported a net loss of $10 million for Q3 2024, a significant increase from the previous year, primarily due to higher administrative costs and expanded operations. Despite this, the company successfully raised $10.1 million through financing activities, supporting its ambitious refinery project. Looking ahead, Stardust Power remains optimistic about the future, focusing on scaling operations and achieving strategic milestones to drive value for stakeholders.

data.title: Pure Storage Inc. Reports Strong Q3 Growth
data.description:
Pure Storage Inc. ( (PSTG) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Pure Storage Inc. presented to its investors.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Pure Storage Inc., a leader in data storage solutions, offers advanced technology platforms that help organizations manage, store, and protect data across various environments, aiming to deliver simplicity and efficiency in data storage. The company’s latest earnings report for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025 reveals a notable revenue increase, a significant design win, and a strategic focus on hyperscalers and AI environments, emphasizing its role in transforming data storage. In its recent financial performance, Pure Storage reported a revenue of $831.1 million, marking a 9% increase year-over-year, with subscription services revenue rising by 22% to $376.4 million. The company also announced achieving industry-first design recognition from a top-four hyperscaler for its DirectFlash technology, highlighting its potential to set new standards in hyperscaler online storage. Notable financial metrics include a GAAP gross margin of 70.1% and a non-GAAP operating margin of 20.1%, alongside an operating cash flow of $97.0 million and a free cash flow of $35.2 million. Pure Storage continues to innovate with its platform, revealing advancements like Pure Fusion v2.0 and strategic partnerships aimed at expanding its footprint in AI and hyperscale environments. Looking forward, Pure Storage’s management remains focused on driving both short-term results and long-term value through disciplined investments, underscoring its ambition to lead in data storage innovation and expand market share in emerging technology sectors.
